compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, S&P TD series, Vents TT series
compatible_devices.notes: CL-A series. Manual 5-position rotary switch (no automation). AC motor fans only; EC fans not compatible. Available in 5A, 7A, 11A, 13A variants. Emergency override button forces 100% fan speed if rotary switch fails. IP44 housing. 230×150×80mm panel-mount format.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 cylinder solenoid valve, CO2 generator gas valve
compatible_devices.notes: Controls a CO2 gas supply solenoid valve (on/off only). Separate output from fan speed control. No CO2 concentration sensing or automatic dosing — purely manual on/off. Emergency override button forces 100% gas supply if switch fails. Suitable for manual CO2 cylinder release valve or generator gas feed. Not a dedicated CO2 controller.
